# sakura_addon_ddos (Resource)

Manages an Addon DDoS.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "sakura_addon_ddos" "foobar" {
  location = "japaneast"
  pricing_level = 1
  patterns = ["/*"]
  origin = {
    hostname = "www.example.com"
    host_header = "example.com"
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `location` (String) The location of the Addon DDoS
- `origin` (Attributes) The origin settings of the Addon DDoS. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--origin))
- `patterns` (List of String) The route patterns of the Addon DDoS.
- `pricing_level` (Number) The pricing level of the Addon DDoS

### Optional

- `timeouts` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--timeouts))

### Read-Only

- `deployment_name` (String) The deployment name of the Addon DDoS
- `id` (String) The ID of the Addon DDoS.
- `url` (String) The URL of the Addon DDoS

<a id="nestedatt--origin"></a>
### Nested Schema for `origin`

Required:

- `host_header` (String) The origin host header.
- `hostname` (String) The origin host name.


<a id="nestedatt--timeouts"></a>
### Nested Schema for `timeouts`

Optional:

- `create` (String) A string that can be [parsed as a duration](https://pkg.go.dev/time#ParseDuration) consisting of numbers and unit suffixes, such as "30s" or "2h45m". Valid time units are "s" (seconds), "m" (minutes), "h" (hours).
- `delete` (String) A string that can be [parsed as a duration](https://pkg.go.dev/time#ParseDuration) consisting of numbers and unit suffixes, such as "30s" or "2h45m". Valid time units are "s" (seconds), "m" (minutes), "h" (hours). Setting a timeout for a Delete operation is only applicable if changes are saved into state before the destroy operation occurs.
